questionHtml: Using a foreign exchange diagram, explain the possible effect of China’s large current account surplus in 2007 on the exchange rate of China’s currency (the renminbi) (paragraph [6]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

For an exchange rate/foreign exchange diagram, the vertical axis may be exchange rate, price of renminbi in another currency, other currency/renminbi or other currency per renminbi. The horizontal axis should be quantity, or quantity of renminbi. A title is not necessary.

  

NB: an acceptable alternative is the supply curve shifting left.

meta.title: Using a foreign exchange diagram, explain the possible effect of China’s large current account surplus in 2007 on the exchange rate of China’s currency (the renminbi) (paragraph [6
breadcrumbLabels: 4.5.2 Changes in demand and supply for a currency—factors
